message:
fix(types,pager,parser,vfs): record parsing hardening, pager rollback journal robustness, WAL checksum fix, and broad correctness improvements

Record Parsing Hardening (fsqlite-types, fsqlite-core, compat_persist):
- parse_record on empty data returns None (was Some([])); trailing body
  bytes now rejected; invalid UTF-8 in TEXT columns returns None instead
  of lossy conversion
- All parse_record call sites now return DatabaseCorrupt errors with
  descriptive messages including rowid and table name instead of silently
  skipping invalid records
- Tests cover corrupt UTF-8 in sqlite_master and table records

SqliteValue Trait Upgrades:
- SqliteValue implements Eq and Ord (was only PartialEq/PartialOrd) using
  f64::total_cmp fallback for NaN
- Cascades Eq to Row, TraceEvent, JsonTableRow, HistogramBucket, Histogram,
  TrieRow, TrieNode, LeapfrogMatch, TrieRelation
- dedup_rows and dedup_value_rows use sort-dedup-restore (O(n log n))
  replacing O(n^2) linear scan

Pager Rollback Journal Robustness (~576 lines):
- rollback_journal_recovery_pending flag set after journal sync; if DB write
  fails mid-commit, rollback replays journal to restore pre-images
- begin() detects pending-recovery flag and auto-recovers before new txn
- Journal truncated+synced before best-effort deletion (leftover inode
  cannot re-trigger replay)
- replay_journal also truncates after successful recovery
- Custom test VFS (JournalDeleteFailVfs, DbWriteFailOnceVfs) with 4 tests

WAL Checksum Fix:
- Correct accumulation order to match SQLite's walChecksumBytes:
  s1 += w1; s2 += s1; s1 += w2; s2 += s1 (was chained incorrectly)
- Fixed in both WAL crate and Unix VFS native checksum

SHM Lock Semantics Fix (memory + unix VFS):
- Exclusive SHM lock no longer removes caller from shared_holders, matching
  SQLite's unixShmLock semantics for proper SHARED downgrade on release

Freelist Pending-Byte Page Skip:
- Freelist takes page_size parameter, skips pending-byte page (offset
  0x40000000) during allocation per SQLite spec section 11.14

UUID Extension Rewrite:
- Replace xorshift64 PRNG with rand::thread_rng().fill_bytes()
- uuid_str_to_blob strict validation: accepts 32 or 36 chars, validates
  hyphen positions, rejects trailing garbage

Parser & Lexer:
- Numbers followed by alpha/underscore produce unrecognized token error
- ?0 and ?N > 32766 rejected at lex time
- Named parameters support Tcl :: namespace separators and $var(key) syntax
- Remove parse-time -float_literal constant folding
- Parser accepts +number in type arguments
- ESCAPE clause on GLOB/MATCH/REGEXP produces arity error (only LIKE)

Bind Parameter Limit:
- claim_anonymous and register_numbered reject indices outside 1..=32766
- validate_bound_parameters checks upper limit

Math Function Fix:
- to_f64 returns None for Blob inputs (was Some(0.0)), matching SQLite NULL

Infrastructure:
- B-epsilon tree separate BETREE_DELETES_TOTAL counter
- SorterCursor Drop impl cleans up spill-run temp files
- SSI witness_keys_overlap handles Page vs ByteRange cross-matching
- Conformal martingale: min history uses min(window_size, 10); total_cmp sort
- Cargo.lock updated for rand dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -900,6 +900,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fsqlite-error",
  "fsqlite-func",
  "fsqlite-types",
+ "rand 0.8.5",
  "tracing",
 ]
